title: Mann Mohana Song Lyrics Jodhaa Akbar
stanzas:
Manu mohanaa
Manu mohanaa
ennuyir kannaa
kaarmugil vannaa varaayo
kodhaiyin kuralai kelaayo

vida petru vaaraai
kaasi mathuraa
vidai solla vaaraai
vazhkai pudhiraa

nee indri suyamvaramaa
kaarmugil vannaa vaaraayo
kannaa
kodhaiyin kuralai kelaayo..

Dhvaragane irulum oliyum
iruvizhi arugae thurathiduthe
irudhayathil thunaiyaaga
nee irukka maattaayaa ?

iruvazhigal sandhikkum idathil
kaalgal irandum kuzhambiduthe
enpaathai sollvaayaa?
dhevagi nandhalaalaa
dhisai yedhu sollvaayaa

Brindhavana nandhakumaaraa
sagiyin venduthal arivaayaa
neengaamal varuvaayaa
nagam pole pirivaayaa?

navaneethaa murali manogaraa
nangaiyin manathai purivaayaa?
purakkanithe selvaayaa

Manu mohanaa
Manu mohanaa
Manu mohanaa
Manu mohanaa
ennuyir kannaa
kaarmugil vannaa varaayo
kodhaiyin kuralai kelaayo

Purushothamane un udhatil
puzhanguzhaai thavalvenaa
un swasam kaatraale
uyir petru vazhvenaa

parthibane un paarvayile
paarkadal amudham
peruvenaa
pasi thaagam marappenaa

vazhkayenum kadalil
thinamum alaiyin mele
alai adikka
idhyam enum padagu adhil
thadumaari modhiduthe

thooyavane thuduppugal potu
karaiyin yaetri viduvaayaa
nadukadalil viduvaa
vaseegara vanumaali
en vedhanai theeraayo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mann Mohana'?

'Mann Mohana' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, beautifully capturing the emotions of the characters in the movie.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Jodhaa Akbar'?

The song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters, Jodhaa and Akbar.

Who is the singer of 'Mann Mohana'?

The song is sung by the talented Madhusree, known for her soulful voice.

Who composed the music for 'Mann Mohana'?

The music for this enchanting song was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was 'Mann Mohana' released?

'Mann Mohana' was released on February 15, 2008, as part of the movie soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Mann Mohana', the enchanting melody beautifully encapsulates the romantic essence of the film Jodhaa Akbar. The song conveys a deep sense of longing and love, reflecting the emotions of the characters as they navigate their relationship. With Madhusree's soulful vocals and AR Rahman's exquisite composition, listeners are transported to a world of romance and devotion. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mann Mohana from Jodhaa Akbar is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voice of Madhusree and the magical touch of AR Rahman's composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance. Experience the beauty of this classic as it weaves a tale of devotion and desire.
stanzaMeanings: Oh beloved, oh beloved, will you come like a dark cloud to my life? Will you listen to the voice of my beloved?
Will you come to take away the pain? Will you come to tell me about life anew?
Are you the one for the self-choice ceremony? Will you come like a dark cloud? Will you listen to the voice of my beloved?
In the darkness and light, will you not be my companion in my heart?
In the place where two paths meet, will you tell me where to go? Which direction should I take?
Oh Krishna, will you come to me like a sweet melody? Will you come without separation like a snake?
Will you fill the heart of the girl with joy? Will you bring happiness?
Will you resolve my sorrows? Will you resolve my troubles?
Oh beloved, oh beloved, oh beloved, oh beloved, will you come like a dark cloud to my life? Will you listen to the voice of my beloved?
Oh Purushothama, will you be my support? Should I live by your breath?
Oh Earth, will I become the nectar of the ocean in your embrace? Will I forget my hunger and thirst?
Will I become a cowherd in your Gokula?
In the sea of life, waves rise and fall, and the sound of the waves echoes in the heart.
Will you remove my pain and let me sail through the sea? Will you help me overcome my suffering?
